items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the computed availability/expiry status for portal queries. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or results that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not address the specific need for computed availability/expiry status, leading to an inconclusive result.
